detail: init objective="Fix and close opencodex issues #78 (opencode-go DeepSeek 400: likely reasoning_content replay / tool_choice / schema dialect in openai-chat adapter) and #82 (hy3-preview offered in catalog but upstream model_not_supported). Root-cause with file:line evidence, implement fixes + regression tests, bun test + tsc pass, post closing comments, close both issues via gh." criteria=0

evidence: Root cause: opencode-go registry omitted deepseek-v4-* from preserveReasoningContentModels (src/providers/registry.ts:375); adapter gates replay at openai-chat.ts:57; DeepSeek V4 thinking contract requires replay (api-docs.deepseek.com/guides/thinking_mode). Fix commit 8942c7c3 + tests/opencode-go-deepseek.test.ts (replay, effort map xhigh->max, no-regression). Corroborated: OpenCode 923af96, LiteLLM 7813947, Roo 970deea.
